vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on /var/log/messages File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /var/log/messages, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0600 /var/log/messages

triage_decision.reason: Changing the mode of /var/log/messages to 0600 is a straightforward file permission adjustment that does not affect authentication, networking, or critical services. The remediation is well‑defined, low‑risk, and aligns with standard STIG hardening practices.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Improper permissions could expose log data to unauthorized users
